prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约344→334→302→469→747名，2021–2023年稳定在300–350名区间，2024年广西新高考改革后位次明显后移至469名，2025年进一步后移至747名，近两年累计后移约445名，呈加速后移趋势；2025年基准位次约747名；该校在广西物理类（原理科）招生计划2021–2025年均为7人，2026年计划扩至10人，较2025年扩招约43%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解、位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学（含医学院）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主校位列第3名，属全国顶尖层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风、校园安全等事件，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，关注度仍处高位；历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信号；浙江大学（含医学院）第五轮学科评估中临床医学A、基础医学A-、药学A+、生物学A等，医学学科实力顶尖；招生专业涵盖临床医学（5+3一体化）、口腔医学、预防医学等，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024–2026年持续高热推荐，口腔医学推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度高；广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，按近年物理类占比约66%估算物理类考生约25.87万人，较2025年物理类26.04万人略降约0.7%，竞争略有缓解；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市，非广西本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在广西招生规模较小（7–10人），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年加速后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约43%（位次数字增大）、考生总数略降（竞争略缓解）、学校顶尖层次吸引力强、声誉偏负面与专业高热相互对冲等因素，在2025年基准位次747名基础上，以扩招效应为主进行修正，预测2026年最低位次约919名，位次区间809–1029名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（八年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学
- 医学试验班类（包含专业。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间809–1029名内，建议以二档（口腔医学、医学试验班类）为主攻方向，一档（临床医学5+3、巴德年医学班）作为冲刺，三档（预防医学）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<809名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 344 → 334 → 302 → 469 → 747. From 2021 to 2023, rankings stabilized in the 300–350 range. After the 2024 Guangxi new college entrance examination reform, rankings significantly shifted to 469, and further shifted to 747 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 445 positions over the past two years, showing an accelerating trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 747. The university's enrollment plan for Guangxi Physics Category (formerly Science) was 7 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and is planned to expand to 10 students in 2026, an increase of about 43% compared to 2025. This relatively large expansion theoretically eases competition slightly and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University (including its School of Medicine) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranks 3rd, placing it at the top national level and strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure and still high attention. No obvious gap signals are seen in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhejiang University (including its School of Medicine) received A in Clinical Medicine, A- in Basic Medicine, A+ in Pharmacy, and A in Biology, indicating top-tier medical disciplines. The enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (5+3 integrated program), Stomatology, Preventive Medicine, etc., which highly match the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine has been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, Stomatology is recommended, and medical majors overall have high application heat. In 2026, Guangxi has approximately 392,000 total examinees, with Physics Category accounting for about 66% in recent years, estimating about 258,700 Physics Category examinees, a slight decrease of about 0.7% from 260,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local Guangxi university, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment scale in Guangxi is small (7–10 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the accelerating backward trend of historical rankings over the past two years, the significant enrollment expansion of about 43% in 2026 (increasing the ranking number), a slight decrease in total examinees (slightly easing competition), the strong attraction of the top-tier university level, and the offsetting effects of negative reputation and high major heat, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 747 and primarily adjusting for the expansion effect, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 919, with a ranking range of 809–1029.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Zhu Kezhen College Ba De Nian Medical Class) (Eight-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology
- Medical Experimental Class (Including Majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 809–1029, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Stomatology, Medical Experimental Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Clinical Medicine 5+3, Ba De Nian Medical Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Preventive Medicine) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<809), you can primarily aim for the top-tier flagship majors.
